Department of Information Technology

Istanbul Galata University IT Department

The IT Department of Istanbul Galata University is responsible for ensuring that both staff and students use evolving information and communication technologies at the highest level.

BlackBoard Distance Education Platform

Istanbul Galata University uses the BlackBoard distance education platform. All courses can be accessed via

http://sanalkampus.galata.edu.tr

.

Email Address

Students enrolled at our university are provided with an email address in the format

firstname.lastname@galata.edu.tr

, with a 100GB email quota. All official communication between students and the university administration is carried out through these email accounts.

EMAIL LOGIN

Office Programs

Each student is provided with

linked to their email account. These licenses can be used to install and use the programs on computers or mobile devices free of charge.

Cloud Storage

Students have

2TB of OneDrive cloud storage

to save their assignments and files. This storage is available to them throughout their time as a student.

Internet Access

On campus, students can connect to the

“Galatauniversity-Student”

SSID using their provided email address and password.

Computer Labs

Students can use fully equipped computers in the university’s computer labs outside of class hours.
